# Ed Xrf

**Summary**: A non-destructive technique to obtain high vertical resolution of major and trace elements.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-septriandi|Septriandi, 2022]] employed ED-XRF to acquire high vertical resolution elemental compositions on the core surface.

## Key Results and Findings

- Over 800 points were scanned, providing a high-vertical resolution of major and trace element composition. ([[2022-septriandi|Septriandi, 2022, p. 64]])
